response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong Staff-level experience, including building high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second and recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators. While he lacks the must-have Python experience, his deep systems thinking, mastery of TypeScript, and extensive background in distributed architectures make him a compelling candidate for this AI-driven engineering role.
strengths: Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven ability to design high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Strong Staff-level technical leadership and ownership, including founding an open-source platform.
concerns: No professional experience with Python, which is listed as a must-have technical skill.
Lacks explicit mention of on-call rotations or incident-response capability.
Current role at re:cinq is very recent, meaning AI-specific experience might be relatively brief.
